titleStmt.title: SII 9.609: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 609. (A.R. No. 398 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE TEMPLE OF SANKARANARAYANA AT SANKARANARAYANA, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 14[66], Krōdhi, Chaitra, śu. 6, Śukravāra corresponding to A.D. 1544 March 28, Friday, f.d.t. ·74, in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Dabugeṟe-Voḍeya, disciple of Chenna-Bomma-Voḍeya of Meṟuvumāye, purchased some plots of land and made a gift of them for the service of the god Śaṅkaranārāyaṇadēva during the regime of Chennayarasaṇṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1466 krōdhisaṁvatsarada cayitra śu 6 śukravāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvaraśrī
vīrapratāpa Uttara dakṣiṇa pūrva paścima catusamudrādhipati vīrasadāśivarāya mahārāyaru
vijayanagariya siṁhāsanavanu pratipālisi barutiha samayadali śrīmatu sakalaguṇa
saṁpaṁnarāda ceṁnayarasaṁṇanavaru taṁma rājyava pratipālisuttiha samayadali śrīma(ṁ)
nmahādēvadēvōttamanāda śrīśaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvara divyaśrī
pādapadmaṁgaḷige meṟuUmāyeya ceṁnabommavoḍeyara śiśyarāda dabugeṟevoḍe
yaru samarpisida dharmaśāsanada paṭeya vakhaṇeya kramaveṁteṁdare nānu ceṁ
neyyarasaṁṇanavara kayyakrayamūlavāgi koṁḍa bhūmiya catusīmeya
vivara śaṁkaranārāyaṇadēvara paḍuva bhāgadalli berikeya bhūmiya catusīmeya viva
ra muṁdu harida bacaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu rudrayajīyana śvadiṁda baḍagalu pa
ḍuvalu yiṁdaṁ mūḍalu paḍavalu bīḷagadeyṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme
ya voḷaguḷaṁtha gadeyanu mu 1 kallugā baha hāḷa catusīme mū
ḍala haṭi diṁdaṁ teṁkalu bacaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu balagaḍeyiṁdaṁ
mūḍadikkinalu nārasiṁhadēvaralliṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme voḷage caute hāḷi kaṁpaṇa
catusīme mūḍalu nāruhoḷeyiṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu maḍuvina
paḍuvalu harida baccaliṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu yerevōṇi gade teṁkalu yiṁtī ca
tusīmevoḷage teṁṭadahāḷige vanayida teṁginamara
taṁkalu paradaṁḍiyindaṁ Uḷa sīmeya vivara mū
paḍuvalu holana daṇḍeyiṁ mūḍalu kere guḍi
teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmevoḷage meke makki mu 8 Ubhayaṁ bījavari
hāḷasīmeya bayalu mu 1 mēle naḍeva
nalu Aki mu 1 keḷagaṇa bāvi Anubha
holanu meṇasu muṁtāda varege beyakaṁ vartane bāḷu
haravariyāgi baṁda vivara mūḍalu Upāra
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ maneya bacaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Upāra
ṇaviṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu harida bacaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catu
gaṁḍugadalū hutana gade 1 ke bituva bīja
vari Aki mu 2 Aḍake bījavari bayalu mū 3 haramanagade 1 ke bitu
va bījavari bayalu mū 2 Āntu 1 ke bījavari dha 12 malupūtana gade 1 ke bī
javari mu 3 Aṁttu bījavari bayalu saluva gēṇiya
bhūmiya mēlaṇa sēse bēḍige kupārahebāruvanu tānē
gayiUtaṁ Aramanege heṁpariyāgi baṁda bhūmi
gadeya catussīmeya vivara dalu yiṁdaṁ
paḍuvalu teṁkalu harida bacalindaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu mēreyāgi naḍa
baḍagalu harida baccaliṁdaṁ teṁkalū yiṁtī catussīme voḷa
gāda gade 1 bījavari 1 ghaḷārada bhāṇōjana gade 1 ke bījavari bayalu mā
gade 1 ke bījavari bayalu nāghaṁḍugadalu muḍi gade 1 ke bittuva bī
javari bayalu mu 3 Aṁtu bittuva bījavari bayalu Aramanege saluva
cauḷige Akiyanu paḍedu koṭaru
gaḍiyalu Aramane yāgi baṁda bhūmi 1 ke catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu
gade dēvasvadiṁdaṁ baḍagalu teṁkalu kāmāṭiya hola
baḍagalu paḍuvalu sadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu hariva ma
yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya voḷagāda bituva �javari bayalu mu(ṁ)nnasaluva gēṇi
ya pataṁga śivana bāḷa mē� Aramanege naḍava
haḷiya giyara holada mūlabhāgada Avaṁ
ke saluva ṭhāvina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu naḍeva dāriyiṁ
paḍuvalu teṁkalu nāyakara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ā sēnabōvana ma
negaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu meṭṭugeya dāriyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī
catussīmeya voḷagaṇa mane ṭhāvu Aṁttu bayalu saha bījavari ma 50 ge
saluva gēṇi hoṁna maḍi saha saluva Aki mu 78 Akṣaradalu yive yeppattayaṁ
ṭu muḍi Akiya bhūmiyanū �yo bhūmige saluva Anubha sēse bha hakalu
muṁtāda bhūmiya svahastatatukālōcita mūlya Ubhaya
pratiphalavāgi krayadravya ga 300 Akṣāradalu
muṁnūru varahaṁnu cennayarasaṁṇanavarige koṭu �yo bhūmiyanu krayamūla
vāgi śaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvara nityadalū naḍava sēve samarpisi di nālu
naḍava sēveya vivara di 1 ke lu mu 54 mu 6 svāmiya
ke mu 9 Abhiśēkha Ahōrātre śata bilapatre śrītoḷasi saha
muḍi 9 Aṁtu yeppattuyeṁṭu muḍe Akkiya bhūmiya
ge saluva maneṭhavanu sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi
śaṁkharanārāyaṇadēvara sēvege The slab is built in after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.609 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
